description: Linear interpolation between two values based on parameter t (0 to 1)
utility: Compute intermediate values along a line segment: map(0.5, a, b) gives midpoint
alternates: map(t, a, b) with numbers - linear interpolation
map(t, P1, P2) with points - point along line segment

examples.expression: A = point(g, 0, 0); B = point(g, 3, 4); M = point(g, map(0.5, A, B))
Q = point(g, map(0.25, x(A), x(B)), map(0.25, y(A), y(B)))
